name.description: Required. The TargetProject name.

requestId.description: Optional. A request ID to identify requests. Specify a unique request ID so that if you must retry your request, the server will know to ignore the request if it has already been completed. The server will guarantee that for at least 60 minutes after the first request. For example, consider a situation where you make an initial request and the request times out. If you make the request again with the same request ID, the server can check if original operation with the same request ID was received, and if so, will ignore the second request. This prevents clients from accidentally creating duplicate commitments. The request ID must be a valid UUID with the exception that zero UUID is not supported (00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000).

CloneJob.description: CloneJob describes the process of creating a clone of a MigratingVM to the requested target based on the latest successful uploaded snapshots. While the migration cycles of a MigratingVm take place, it is possible to verify the uploaded VM can be started in the cloud, by creating a clone. The clone can be created without any downtime, and it is created using the latest snapshots which are already in the cloud. The cloneJob is only responsible for its work, not its products, which means once it is finished, it will never touch the instance it created. It will only delete it in case of the CloneJob being cancelled or upon failure to clone.

vmCapabilitiesInfo.description: Output only. Information about VM capabilities needed for some Compute Engine features.

enumDescriptions: The architecture is unknown.
The architecture is one of the x86 architectures.
The architecture is ARM64.

disks.description: Output only. The disks attached to the source VM.

endTime.description: Output only. The time the step has ended.

startTime.description: Output only. The time the step has started.

DiskMigrationStep.description: DiskMigrationStep holds information about the disk migration step progress.

locale.description: The locale used following the specification defined at https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/bcp/bcp47.txt. Examples are: "en-US", "fr-CH", "es-MX"

message.description: The localized error message in the above locale.

LocalizedMessage.description: Provides a localized error message that is safe to return to the user which can be attached to an RPC error.

ImageImportOsAdaptationParameters.description: Parameters affecting the OS adaptation process.

generalize.description: Optional. Set to true in order to generalize the imported image. The generalization process enables co-existence of multiple VMs created from the same image. For Windows, generalizing the image removes computer-specific information such as installed drivers and the computer security identifier (SID).

enumDescriptions: The license type is the default for the OS.
The license type is Pay As You Go license type.
The license type is Bring Your Own License type.
licenseType.description: Optional. Choose which type of license to apply to the imported image.

bootConversion.description: Optional. By default the image will keep its existing boot option. Setting this property will trigger an internal process which will convert the image from using the existing boot option to another. The size of the boot disk might be increased to allow the conversion
enumDescriptions: Unspecified conversion type.
No conversion.
Convert from BIOS to EFI.

adaptationModifiers.description: Optional. Modifiers to be used as configuration of the OS adaptation process.

name.description: The disk name.

Disk.description: A message describing a data disk.

DiskImageTargetDetails.description: The target details of the image resource that will be created by the import job.

labels.description: Optional. A map of labels to associate with the image.

description.description: Optional. An optional description of the image.

osAdaptationParameters.description: Optional. Use to set the parameters relevant for the OS adaptation process.

imageName.description: Required. The name of the image to be created.

additionalLicenses.description: Optional. Additional licenses to assign to the image. Format: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/PROJECT_ID/global/licenses/LICENSE_NAME Or https://www.googleapis.com/compute/beta/projects/PROJECT_ID/global/licenses/LICENSE_NAME

singleRegionStorage.description: Optional. Set to true to set the image storageLocations to the single region of the import job. When false, the closest multi-region is selected.

encryption.description: Immutable. The encryption to apply to the image.

familyName.description: Optional. The name of the image family to which the new image belongs.

targetProject.description: Required. Reference to the TargetProject resource that represents the target project in which the imported image will be created.

dataDiskImageImport.description: Optional. Use to skip OS adaptation process.

kmsKey.description: Required. The name of the encryption key that is stored in Google Cloud KMS.

Encryption.description: Encryption message describes the details of the applied encryption.

Expiration.description: Expiration holds information about the expiration of a MigratingVm.

extendable.description: Output only. Describes whether the expiration can be extended.

extensionCount.description: Output only. The number of times expiration was extended.

expireTime.description: Output only. Timestamp of when this resource is considered expired.

VmwareVmDetails.description: VmwareVmDetails describes a VM in vCenter.

cpuCount.description: The number of cpus in the VM.

memoryMb.description: The size of the memory of the VM in MB.

bootOption.description: Output only. The VM Boot Option.
enumDescriptions: The boot option is unknown.
The boot option is EFI.
The boot option is BIOS.

datacenterDescription.description: The descriptive name of the vCenter's datacenter this VM is contained in.

enumDescriptions: The architecture is unknown.
The architecture is one of the x86 architectures.
The architecture is ARM64.

datacenterId.description: The id of the vCenter's datacenter this VM is contained in.

guestDescription.description: The VM's OS. See for example https://vdc-repo.vmware.com/vmwb-repository/dcr-public/da47f910-60ac-438b-8b9b-6122f4d14524/16b7274a-bf8b-4b4c-a05e-746f2aa93c8c/doc/vim.vm.GuestOsDescriptor.GuestOsIdentifier.html for types of strings this might hold.

uuid.description: The unique identifier of the VM in vCenter.

diskCount.description: The number of disks the VM has.

displayName.description: The display name of the VM. Note that this is not necessarily unique.

committedStorageMb.description: The total size of the storage allocated to the VM in MB.

enumDescriptions: Power state is not specified.
The VM is turned ON.
The VM is turned OFF.
The VM is suspended. This is similar to hibernation or sleep mode.
powerState.description: The power state of the VM at the moment list was taken.

vmId.description: The VM's id in the source (note that this is not the MigratingVm's id). This is the moref id of the VM.

Tag.description: Tag is an AWS tag representation.

CutoverStep.description: CutoverStep holds information about the cutover step progress.

startTime.description: The time the step has started.

previousReplicationCycle.description: A replication cycle prior cutover step.

endTime.description: The time the step has ended.

ImageImportJob.description: ImageImportJob describes the progress and result of an image import.

cloudStorageUri.description: Output only. The path to the Cloud Storage file from which the image should be imported.

warnings.description: Output only. Warnings that occurred during the image import.

endTime.description: Output only. The time the image import was ended.

name.description: Output only. The resource path of the ImageImportJob.

steps.description: Output only. The image import steps list representing its progress.

state.description: Output only. The state of the image import.
enumDescriptions: The state is unknown.
The image import has not yet started.
The image import is active and running.
The image import has finished successfully.
The image import has finished with errors.
The image import is being cancelled.
The image import was cancelled.

machineImageTargetDetails.description: Output only. Target details used to import a machine image.

errors.description: Output only. Provides details on the error that led to the image import state in case of an error.

createdResources.description: Output only. The resource paths of the resources created by the image import job.

diskImageTargetDetails.description: Output only. Target details used to import a disk image.

createTime.description: Output only. The time the image import was created (as an API call, not when it was actually created in the target).

totalPauseDuration.description: The accumulated duration the replication cycle was paused.

name.description: The identifier of the ReplicationCycle.

steps.description: The cycle's steps list representing its progress.

progressPercent.description: The current progress in percentage of this cycle. Was replaced by 'steps' field, which breaks down the cycle progression more accurately.

endTime.description: The time the replication cycle has ended.

error.description: Output only. Provides details on the state of the cycle in case of an error.

startTime.description: The time the replication cycle has started.

warnings.description: Output only. Warnings that occurred during the cycle.

enumDescriptions: The state is unknown. This is used for API compatibility only and is not used by the system.
The replication cycle is running.
The replication cycle is paused.
The replication cycle finished with errors.
The replication cycle finished successfully.

ReplicationCycle.description: ReplicationCycle contains information about the current replication cycle status.
